rationale: Educ. Code §45.113 governs county permanent school fund trusts and disposition of county school lands. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, appraisal values, or Tax Code §11.13, so increasing the homestead exemption does not conflict with this provision.
quote: Sec. 45.113. TRUST FOR COUNTY PERMANENT SCHOOL FUND.
_note: No conflict. This statute addresses county school land trusts, not property tax exemptions.
